Title: Relates to the computation of building aid for the Schenectady city school district
Summary: Relates to the computation of building aid for construction, reconstruction or modernizing of no more than one project by the Schenectady city school district.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to the computation of building aid for construction, reconstruction or modernizing of one project for the Schenectady city school district
